BULK_ACTION.ASSIGN_CONFIRMATION_LABEL: 您確定要將 {conversationCount} 個 {conversationLabel} 分配給
BULK_ACTION.UNASSIGN_CONFIRMATION_LABEL: 您確定要取消分配 {conversationCount} 個 {conversationLabel} 嗎？
BULK_ACTION.ASSIGN_FAILED: 分配對話失敗。請再試一次。
BULK_ACTION.RESOLVE_SUCCESFUL: 成功將對話標記為已解決.
BULK_ACTION.RESOLVE_FAILED: 解決對話失敗。請再試一次。
BULK_ACTION.ALL_CONVERSATIONS_SELECTED_ALERT: 僅選擇了此頁面上可見的對話。

UPDATE.UPDATE_FAILED: 更新對話失敗。請再試一次。

RESOLVE.ALL_MISSING_ATTRIBUTES: 由於缺少所需屬性而無法解析對話
RESOLVE.PARTIAL_SUCCESS: 某些對話​​在解析之前需要必需的屬性，因此被跳過

RESOLVE.ALL_MISSING_ATTRIBUTES: Cannot resolve conversations due to missing required attributes
RESOLVE.PARTIAL_SUCCESS: Some conversations need required attributes before resolving and were skipped

LABELS.ASSIGN_FAILED: 分配標籤失敗。請再試一次。

TEAMS.ASSIGN_FAILED: 分配團隊失敗。請再試一次。
